title: Smoky Shrimp Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish loaded with smoky shrimp and a hint of spice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In the same skillet, add smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add aioli and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in cooked shrimp.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
